     Title: Defending Jailbreak Prompts via In-Context Adversarial Game 
     Authors: Yujun Zhou ,  Yufei Han ,  Haomin Zhuang ,  Kehan Guo ,  Zhenwen Liang ,  Hongyan Bao ,  Xiangliang Zhang              View a PDF of the paper titled Defending Jailbreak Prompts via In-Context Adversarial Game, by Yujun Zhou and 5 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities across diverse applications. However, concerns regarding their security, particularly the vulnerability to jailbreak attacks, persist.
